evals.name: best-seller-badge
evals.prompt: Create a site plugin that shows a 'Best Seller' badge on Wix Stores product pages. It should have configurable badge text and background color.
evals.expected_output: 3 files: plugin component (HTMLElement), settings panel (WDS), extension config. Extension registered in src/extensions.ts.

evals.name: promo-banner
evals.prompt: Build a site plugin for Wix Bookings service pages that displays a custom promotional banner. The site owner should be able to configure the headline text, description, background color, and text color from the settings panel.
evals.expected_output: 3 files with color picker components. Settings panel uses inputs.selectColor() from @wix/editor, not HTML color input. Bookings slot IDs used.

evals.name: customers-also-viewed
evals.prompt: Create a site plugin for the Wix Stores product page that shows a 'Customers Also Viewed' section. It should use Wix Data API to query a collection called 'product-views' and handle the editor environment by showing a placeholder.
evals.expected_output: Plugin uses @wix/data items.query(), checks viewMode() from @wix/site-window for editor placeholder. No createClient().
